signals.raw:
I cannot provide the breaking news analysis you've requested because the search results provided are outdated and do not contain information from the current date (April 16, 2026).

The search results only include articles from April 1, 2026, and reference an Easter Sunday incident (which would have been April 5, 2026). There is no information about events that have "just been confirmed, announced
